config_template.scalar_overload: input_tensor_b may be a python float; zero scalar yields zeros_like

applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.div_no_nan(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b); fusion_notes: Fuses the 3-op torch subsequence (eq-zero mask -> elementwise div -> where/select) into a single ttnn binary composite op. Scalar overload available when divisor is a python float.

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config

placement_observations.size_descriptor: test shapes, range [-150, 150] (or python float scalar in {-5.1, 0.0, 10.9})
